_meta.purpose: Behavioural test set for the FusionCypherAgent. Each item is a question the system SHOULD be able to answer using the KG + abstract retrieval. Failures are logged via analysis.answer_gap_logger and aggregated by analysis.answer_gap_report, so the test suite doubles as the feeder for the systematic gap report.

categories.definition: What is X? - relies on abstract excerpts (pattern 7/8).
categories.mechanism: How / why questions - needs physics reasoning grounded in abstracts.
categories.structural: Which entities are most X? - pure KG aggregation (patterns 1/2/5).
categories.comparative: X vs Y questions - needs both KG stats and abstracts.
categories.missing_expected: Questions we EXPECT to fail today; they trigger the gap-report pipeline.

questions.question: Which fusion devices appear most often in the literature?
questions.source: Raul feedback - was returning wrong/conflated answer

questions.question: What fuel do fusion devices use and why?
Why is the deuterium-tritium reaction preferred over D-D or D-He3?
questions.source: Raul feedback image - D-T reaction-rate curve peak at ~60 keV; relaxed from cross section/temperature (not in graph)

questions.question: What is the difference between inertial and magnetic confinement fusion?
questions.source: Raul feedback image - ICF vs MCF schematic

questions.question: How is the energy released in a D-T fusion reaction distributed between the alpha particle and the neutron?
questions.source: Raul feedback image - 80% energy carried by neutron
questions.expected_to_fail: likely - tests whether abstracts cover quantitative energy split

questions.question: What is the divertor in a tokamak?
What is the Lawson criterion?
questions.expected_to_fail: candidate - depends on whether 'lawson criterion' was extracted as an entity

questions.question: Which entities are most connected to ITER?
Which categories contain the most entities?
How has research on ITER evolved over the years?
Show the publication trend for stellarator research.
Find a path between divertor and tritium in the knowledge graph.
What is the cost in dollars of building ITER?
questions.rationale: Quantitative cost data is unlikely to be in NER abstracts; should trigger sentinel.

questions.question: What is the operational schedule of SPARC for 2027?
questions.rationale: Future schedule not in graph; sentinel may or may not fire depending on which SPARC papers are retrieved. Tested via test_sentinel_fires in pytest.
